headline: CSX Q1 Deep Dive: Efficiency Initiatives and Network Expansion Drive Margin Growth
summary: Freight rail services provider CSX (NASDAQ:CSX) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 1.7% year on year to $3.48 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.43 per share was 10.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
